'''chowataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:upfaced|upfaced]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-w-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:upfaced|upfaced]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chowataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chowatithi|chowatithi]] || [[word:chowatiji|chowatiji]] || [[word:chowatishi|chowatishi]] || [[word:chowatiki|chowatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chowatuthuthu|chowatuthuthu]] || [[word:chowatujuju|chowatujuju]] || [[word:chowatushushu|chowatushushu]] || [[word:chowatukuku|chowatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chowatuthu|chowatuthu]] || [[word:chowatuju|chowatuju]] || [[word:chowatushu|chowatushu]] || [[word:chowatuku|chowatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chowatufthuf|chowatufthuf]] || [[word:chowatufjuf|chowatufjuf]] || [[word:chowatufshuf|chowatufshuf]] || [[word:chowatufkuf|chowatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chowatethe|chowatethe]] || [[word:chowateje|chowateje]] || [[word:chowateshe|chowateshe]] || [[word:chowateke|chowateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chowatothotho|chowatothotho]] || [[word:chowatojojo|chowatojojo]] || [[word:chowatoshosho|chowatoshosho]] || [[word:chowatokoko|chowatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chowatotho|chowatotho]] || [[word:chowatojo|chowatojo]] || [[word:chowatosho|chowatosho]] || [[word:chowatoko|chowatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chowatofthof|chowatofthof]] || [[word:chowatofjof|chowatofjof]] || [[word:chowatofshof|chowatofshof]] || [[word:chowatofkof|chowatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chowatĂŻfthĂŻf|chowatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chowatĂŻfjĂŻf|chowatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chowatĂŻfshĂŻf|chowatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chowatĂŻfkĂŻf|chowatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chowatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chowatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chowatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chowatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chowatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chowatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chowatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chowatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chowatĂŻfthĂŻf|chowatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chowatĂŻfjĂŻf|chowatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chowatĂŻfshĂŻf|chowatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chowatĂŻfkĂŻf|chowatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chowatĂŻfthĂŻf|chowatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chowatĂŻfjĂŻf|chowatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chowatĂŻfshĂŻf|chowatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chowatĂŻfkĂŻf|chowatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chowatĂŠthĂŠ|chowatĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chowatĂŠjĂŠ|chowatĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chowatĂŠshĂŠ|chowatĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chowatĂŠkĂŠ|chowatĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chowatathatha|chowatathatha]] || [[word:chowatajaja|chowatajaja]] || [[word:chowatashasha|chowatashasha]] || [[word:chowatakaka|chowatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chowatatha|chowatatha]] || [[word:chowataja|chowataja]] || [[word:chowatasha|chowatasha]] || [[word:chowataka|chowataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chowatafthaf|chowatafthaf]] || [[word:chowatafjaf|chowatafjaf]] || [[word:chowatafshaf|chowatafshaf]] || [[word:chowatafkaf|chowatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chowatasha|chowatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chowatshĂ«sha|chowatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chowatrosha|chowatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chowatmusha|chowatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chowatyasha|chowatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochowatnkshĂ«sha|gochowatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochowatnkrosha|gochowatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochowatnkmusha|gochowatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochowatnkyasha|gochowatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chowawatasha|chowawatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chowawatshĂ«sha|chowawatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chowawatrosha|chowawatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chowawatmusha|chowawatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chowawatyasha|chowawatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochowawatnkshĂ«sha|gochowawatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochowawatnkrosha|gochowawatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochowawatnkmusha|gochowawatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochowawatnkyasha|gochowawatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chewĂŠtasha|chewĂŠtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chewĂŠtshĂ«sha|chewĂŠtshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chewĂŠtrosha|chewĂŠtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chewĂŠtmusha|chewĂŠtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chewĂŠtyasha|chewĂŠtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochewĂŠtnkshĂ«sha|gochewĂŠtnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochewĂŠtnkrosha|gochewĂŠtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochewĂŠtnkmusha|gochewĂŠtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochewĂŠtnkyasha|gochewĂŠtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chowfatasha|chowfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chowfatshĂ«sha|chowfatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chowfatrosha|chowfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chowfatmusha|chowfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chowfatyasha|chowfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochowfatnkshĂ«sha|gochowfatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochowfatnkrosha|gochowfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochowfatnkmusha|gochowfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochowfatnkyasha|gochowfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
